overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character in Western attire exploring a Victorian mansion estate. The character walks from the street through ornate iron gates, crosses the front garden with a circular fountain, passes through a covered side trellis walkway, and explores a rear brick courtyard with a rectangular pond and white pergola. The atmosphere is moody and overcast with lush spring vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: gravel street approaching Victorian mansion front gates

events.description: character walks through the open iron gates onto the mansion property
character turns slightly right to follow the curved front path toward the fountain

agents.ego_description: walking steadily from the street through the iron gates and up the front gravel path toward the mansion entrance

entered.detail: large three-story Victorian mansion with ornate dark wood trim and multiple balconies
ornate black iron gates with stone pillars flanking the entrance
stone fountain with tiered basin in the center of the front courtyard
tall palm tree flanking the left side of the mansion entrance
tree with pink blossoms on the right side of the property

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a grand Victorian mansion from the gravel street, passing through open iron gates into the front courtyard. A circular stone fountain sits in the center of the walkway, surrounded by garden benches and flowering beds, while palm trees frame the dark wooden facade of the house.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered side walkway with wooden trellis and ivy-covered lattice walls

events.description: character turns left around the mansion corner into the narrow side passage
character exits the covered trellis walkway into the open rear garden

agents.ego_description: navigating around the left side of the mansion through a narrow covered walkway with lattice walls covered in ivy

entered.detail: arched wooden lattice structure forming a covered walkway along the side of the house
wooden lattice walls covered in dense green ivy and climbing vines
tall shuttered windows along the side facade of the mansion

segments.scene_description: The character turns left to bypass the main entrance, entering a narrow side passage enclosed by a wooden trellis covered in dense ivy. The walkway runs alongside the mansion's side windows, creating a sheltered corridor before opening into the rear garden area.

scene_state.functional_zone: rear garden courtyard with rectangular pond, white pergola, and outdoor seating

events.description: character slows and turns to survey the garden, examining the fountain and seating area
character turns around to face back toward the mansion's rear entrance

agents.ego_description: exploring the rear courtyard, walking past the rectangular fountain and under the white pergola, then turning to view the mansion from the garden

entered.detail: long rectangular stone pond with a central tiered fountain and green water
white wooden pergola structure with lattice roof providing shade over garden seating
metal garden tables and chairs arranged under the pergola and around the courtyard
red brick paved courtyard surface with moss between the stones
stone staircase leading up to the mansion's rear entrance with wooden doors

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the side passage, the character enters a spacious rear garden with a rectangular pond fountain and a white pergola covering outdoor seating. The brick courtyard is surrounded by lattice fencing and potted plants. The character explores the area, walking around the fountain and turning to view the mansion's rear facade and entrance stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a public gravel street into the secluded, ornate gardens of a Victorian estate. It begins as the character passes through open iron gates into a front courtyard, moving past a circular stone fountain and flowering beds toward the dark wooden facade of the mansion. As the character bypasses the main entrance, the scene shifts into a sheltered side passage enclosed by a wooden trellis dripping with dense ivy. The camera then emerges from this narrow corridor into a spacious rear brick courtyard, where the environment opens up to reveal a rectangular pond fountain and a white pergola. Finally, the movement circles the water feature before turning back to view the mansion's rear facade and entrance stairs.
